title: São Luís, MA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to São Luís, MA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

São Luís is a city in MA with a population of 1,108,975. An island capital with a UNESCO-listed historic center, famous for its azulejo tiles, reggae culture, and Lençóis Maranhenses nearby.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
